_comment: Tier-2 for 4C scalar_transport#0: section name must be 'SCALAR TRANSPORT DYNAMIC' (full spelling), NOT 'SCATRA DYNAMIC' (the abbreviation). 4C rejects 'SCATRA DYNAMIC' with 'Section ... is not a valid section name.' from core/io/src/4C_io_input_file.cpp:546. Catalog claim verified empirically 2026-06-01.
expect_in_output: Section 'SCATRA DYNAMIC' is not a valid section name
